name: living-docs
description: Maintain a visual HTML documentation system for any codebase — organized by domain (extensible) × type (architecture / changes / plans), with a system-wide architecture page, roadmap, and auto-aggregated glossary. Shared CSS (centered body + sticky TOC), pure-CSS architecture box diagrams, local-vendored mermaid flowcharts, a validation gate (broken links / orphans / missing diagrams or glossary / stale code references), and scaffolding scripts.
